case_title: ALICE C. LOO VS. RESIDENTIAL MORTGAGE CAPITAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-07-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-20-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-06-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Alice C. Loo appearing on her own behalf. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
